meta.description: Custom 12-month lawn care program for Oakhurst NSW — Kikuyu, Zoysia, Couch
meta.climate: Humid subtropical — hot summers, mild winters, occasional frost risk
notes: LawnPride PDFs (Zoysia Fine Leaf + Kikuyu) used as reference only
Couch treated on same schedule as Kikuyu (closest grass type match)
All quantities calculated from actual zone m² — not rounded estimates
Kelpxtra MUST always be applied solo — never tank mixed
Iron overload rule: reduce Tracemaxx to 100mL/100sqm when tank-mixing with GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm
Tribute is NOT safe on Kikuyu — back lawn excluded from Tribute applications
Heritage Maxx must NOT be applied via backpack sprayer

tasks.label: GreenXtra + Tracemaxx tank mix (foliar)

products.name: Tracemaxx
products.note: Reduced to 100mL/100sqm — iron overload rule when tank-mixing with GreenXtra

tasks.notes: Allow to dry on leaf — do NOT water in. Apply in cool hours (early morning). Dilute with water before mixing concentrates.

tasks.label: Kelpxtra — solo application (separate day)
tasks.notes: MUST be applied on a SEPARATE day from all other products. Never tank mix.

tasks.label: TX10 granular fertiliser
tasks.notes: Water in thoroughly after application. Brush or blow off hard surfaces immediately — iron stains.

tasks.label: Activ8EXTRA + Seaweed Secrets + Nature's Soil Wetter tank mix
tasks.notes: Compatible combination. Dilute with water before mixing. Water in lightly after application.

tasks.label: Stimulus root stimulant (soil drench)

products.name: Stimulus
products.note: 200mL/100sqm soil drench mode for summer heat stress root support

tasks.notes: Water in thoroughly (minimum 5L water carrier per 100sqm). Targets root growth during summer heat stress.

tasks.label: Acelepryn — curative lawn grub application (if required)

products.name: Acelepryn
products.note: Apply only if grub activity observed. Low stock — 100mL remaining.

tasks.notes: Apply if lawn armyworm, black beetle larvae or grub activity detected. Water in well. Low stock — 100mL remaining.
tasks.condition: Apply only if insect activity observed

tasks.label: Spartan pre-emergent (late summer — winter weed prevention)

products.name: Spartan
products.note: 20mL/100sqm for ~6 month control of winter weeds

products.name: Hydramaxx
products.note: Pairs with Spartan to aid soil penetration

tasks.notes: Water in within 7 days (minimum 6mm irrigation). Area must be weed-free before application. Dilute with water before mixing.

tasks.label: GreenXtra + Tracemaxx tank mix (foliar)
tasks.notes: Apply on a different day to Spartan. Allow to dry on leaf.

tasks.label: Kelpxtra — solo application
tasks.notes: MUST be applied solo — never tank mix with any other product.

tasks.label: Activ8EXTRA + Seaweed Secrets tank mix
tasks.notes: Compatible combination. Apply in cool hours.

tasks.label: Maintain granular fertiliser — Kikuyu + Couch zones
tasks.notes: Kikuyu and Couch zones only. Water in thoroughly. Brush off hard surfaces — iron stains.

tasks.label: Tombstone Duo preventative fungicide (if conditions warrant)
tasks.notes: Apply preventatively in hot humid conditions. Max 2 consecutive applications then rotate fungicide group.
tasks.condition: Apply if hot/humid conditions prevail or disease symptoms appear

tasks.notes: Water in well. Promotes root depth before winter.

tasks.label: Activ8EXTRA + Seaweed Secrets + Nature's Soil Wetter tank mix
tasks.notes: Autumn soil biology support. Water in lightly.

tasks.label: Tombstone Duo preventative fungicide
tasks.notes: Autumn fungicide preventative — brown patch, dollar spot, winter fusarium risk rises. Max 2 consecutive applications.

tasks.notes: Allow to dry on leaf. Apply in cool hours.

products.name: TX10 (5-2-8)
products.note: Reduced to low rate for late autumn — minimise growth before dormancy

tasks.notes: Low rate — avoid promoting lush growth before winter. Water in.

tasks.label: Activ8EXTRA + Seaweed Secrets + Nature's Soil Wetter tank mix
tasks.notes: Late autumn soil biology maintenance. Reduced Activ8EXTRA rate for cooler months.

tasks.notes: Winter colour maintenance. Allow to dry on leaf.

tasks.label: Kelpxtra — solo application
tasks.notes: Apply solo. Frost and disease resistance support.

tasks.label: Seaweed Secrets + Nature's Soil Wetter tank mix
tasks.notes: Winter soil biology and moisture retention support. Water in.

tasks.applicationMethod: Professional spray equipment — NOT backpack sprayer
tasks.notes: DO NOT apply with backpack sprayer (label restriction). Preventative for winter fusarium, pythium, brown patch. Max 2 consecutive applications then rotate.
tasks.condition: Apply if disease symptoms appear or wet mild conditions prevail

tasks.notes: Apply late August for summer weed prevention. Area must be weed-free first. Water in within 7 days (6mm minimum).

tasks.notes: Spring preventative. Low stock — total 100mL covers ~6.7m² at 15mL/100sqm; prioritise Back Lawn. Consider restocking.

tasks.notes: Spring root push. Apply on a different day from tank mix. Water in well.

tasks.label: Spring renovation — scarify, aerate, top-dress
tasks.applicationMethod: Ryobi 36V Scarifier + manual/machine aeration + top-dressing spread
tasks.notes: Scarify with Ryobi 36V at appropriate depth. Aerate. Apply top-dressing. Follow with Stimulus and Kelpxtra applications post-renovation.

tasks.label: Post-renovation: Kelpxtra — solo (same day or next day after renovation)
tasks.notes: Apply solo post-renovation. Accelerates recovery.

cautions.iron-overload: Iron overload risk: reduce Tracemaxx to 100mL/100sqm when tank-mixing with GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm
cautions.staining: This product can cause staining on hard surfaces — brush or blow off immediately. Allow to dry on leaf.
cautions.kelpxtra-solo: CRITICAL: Kelpxtra must ALWAYS be applied solo — never tank mixed with any other LawnPride concentrate or any other product
cautions.tank-mix-dilute-first: When mixing concentrates together — always dilute with water first before combining
cautions.fungicide-rotation: Max 2 consecutive applications of same fungicide group — then rotate to different mode of action (resistance management)
cautions.no-backpack-sprayer: Heritage Maxx label restriction: DO NOT apply via backpack sprayer
cautions.low-stock: Low stock alert — check inventory before scheduling application
cautions.pre-emergent-weed-free-first: Pre-emergent only — will not kill established weeds. Ensure area is weed-free before applying Spartan
